STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-RESONANCE_CORE.des: At the start of combat, gain two [gold]Evolution Points[/gold] and [purple]Super-Evolution Point[/purple]
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-FUSION_PLATING.des: Whenever you [gold]Fuse[/gold] an Artifact, gain 2 Block.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-MULLIGAN.title: Mulligan
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-MULLIGAN.descripti: At the start of your first turn, choose up to 4 cards in your hand and return them to your draw pile. Draw a card for each card returned this way.
STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-MULLIGAN.selection: Return cards to your draw pile.
